analysis: The back half of this stretch is genuinely impressive — you hit four consecutive nights of 7h 19m or more, and that 7h 56m on Friday with 2h 34m of REM is the kind of night your brain was absolutely feasting on. The awake time cleaned right up too, dropping from that messy 1h 47m mid-stretch down to under 45 minutes consistently, which means whatever you're doing with the wind-down routine is actually landing. The one thing worth noticing is that deep sleep has been quietly sliding — you opened with 49 and 51 minutes early on, and by last night it was down to 28, so that's a pattern to watch without panicking about it. Overall though, you went from two scrappy six-hour nights at the start of the stretch to four solid sevens in a row, and that arc is a whole mood.
